hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*) printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -qE -e "(^|[[:space:]])--no-verify\b" -e "(^|[[:space:]])-[a-zA-Z]*n[a-zA-Z]*([[:space:]]|$)" && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Commit gate: --no-verify/-n is not allowed. Commits must pass the prek pre-commit hooks (fmt, clippy, test).\"}}";; esac; exit 0
